title: SVG Path Drawing Text Animation
description: SVG text stroke-drawing animation using `strokeDashoffset` and SMIL `<animate>` element. Renders bold gradient text (pink to red) whose stroke draws on in an infinite 8-second loop. No React state or JavaScript — pure SVG/SMIL animation.
prompt_text:
# SVG Path Drawing Text Animation SVG text stroke-drawing animation using `strokeDashoffset` and SMIL `` element. Renders bold gradient text (pink to red) whose stroke draws on in an infinite 8-second loop. No React state or JavaScript — pure SVG/SMIL animation. ## Use when - Adding a decorative text reveal animation to a hero or section heading. - Drawing attention to a key headline with a cinematic stroke-draw effect. - Creating a playful animated brand word or tagline. ## Stack - Framework: react - Libraries: none - Requires: tailwind ## Install ```bash none ``` ## Component — svg-path-drawing-text-animation.tsx ```tsx import React from 'react'; const PathAnimation = () => { return (
); }; export default PathAnimation; ``` ## Demo ```tsx import PathAnimation from "@/components/ui/svg-path-drawing-text-animation"; const DemoOne = () => { return ; }; export { DemoOne }; ``` ## Notes - Uses SMIL `` — not supported in IE. Works in all modern browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge). - The `strokeDasharray="1000"` is hardcoded. For variable-length text, measure the text path length programmatically with `textEl.getComputedTextLength()` and set `strokeDasharray` dynamically.
